page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 6 Gbps. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation combined with a dense memory configuration makes it a viable option for workloads requiring significant RAM without the overhead of high vCPU counts.

The ecs.r9a.2xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads. Suitable use cases include medium-sized databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks that benefit from a dedicated CPU allocation and a high memory-to-core ratio.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor. Operating at 2.7 GHz, this x86_64 instance features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, the ecs.r9a.2xlarge offers a balanced resource profile for memory-intensive applications. It is well-suited for workloads such as in-memory databases, caching systems, and enterprise applications requiring consistent compute performance and substantial memory capacity.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and a high memory-to-core ratio for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
